fields.usernameHint: optional · na only you fit get am

security.title: Sign-in & security
security.description: Add extra protection for your account.

changePassword.title: Password
changePassword.descriptionChange: Change the password wey you dey use sign in
changePassword.descriptionSet: Set password to sign in with your email
changePassword.needVerifiedEmail: You need verified email before you fit set password.
changePassword.sendCodeIntro: We go send verification code to {{email}} to confirm say na you before you set password.
changePassword.checkEmail: Check your email for the 6-digit code.

errors.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.enterTotp: Enter your two-factor authentication code to continue.
errors.update: We no fit update your password.
errors.sendCode: We no fit send the code. Abeg try again.
errors.invalidCode: That code no correct or e don expire.

deactivate.label: Deactivate account
deactivate.detail: Off am small time. Sign in again anytime to bring am back.
deactivate.dialogDescription: We go off your account small time and sign you out. Your data, balance, and group savings go still dey safe. Sign in again anytime to on am back.
deactivate.error: We no fit deactivate the account.

delete.label: Delete account
delete.detail: Comot your account and data for good
delete.dialogDescription: This one go comot your profile for good and stop your access. You fit only delete when your balance na zero and you no get any personal or group savings wey dey active. Type DELETE to confirm.
delete.error: We no fit delete the account.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Sign in with Face ID, Touch ID, or security key
passkeys.empty: No passkey dey yet. Add one make sign-in fast and safe.

errors.add: We no fit add that passkey. Abeg try again.
errors.remove: We no fit remove that passkey. Abeg try again.

backupCodes.title: Save your backup codes
backupCodes.description: Each code dey work only once. Keep dem for safe place. Dem go help you sign in if you lose your authenticator.

twoFactor.title: Authenticator app
twoFactor.description: Make e need 6-digit code for sign-in for extra security

setup.instructions: Scan this QR code with Google Authenticator, 1Password, or any TOTP app, then enter the 6-digit code wey e show.

regenerateForm.instructions: Enter current code or backup code to make fresh set. Your old backup codes go stop to work.

disableForm.instructions: Enter current code or backup code to turn off 2FA.

errors.startSetup: We no fit start the setup.
errors.codeFailed: That code no work. Try again.

stepUp.title: Confirm say na you
stepUp.descBoth: Enter your password and your two-factor authentication code to continue.
stepUp.descTotp: Enter your two-factor authentication code to continue.
stepUp.descEmail: We go email you one-time code to confirm this change.

errors.sendCode: We no fit send the code. Abeg try again.
errors.enterEmailCode: Abeg enter the code wey we email you.
errors.enterPassword: Abeg enter your password to continue.
errors.enterTotp: Abeg enter your two-factor authentication code to continue.

imageUpload.defaultHint: Add photo make the dream dey alive.
